text:
"At The Very Beginning" is a song from the film Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance. It is track 1 in the album Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance Original Soundtrack, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/19800 

In the film, the song is featured during the opening battle between the Third Angel and Evangelion Provisional Unit-05.

It was also reused in the anime short Evangelion: Another Impact (Confidential).

Lyrics

 
At the very beginning, we were created
To live together but soon, we hated

In greed and selfishness we,
Could never prosper
Created enemies against god's will.
